name: Core Lithium Ltd
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$0.2934. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.2916 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.2934, stop A$0.2277, target A$0.3050. Risk/reward is 0.18:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
